_comment: Ordered training phases + counter anchors for Hevy routine titles (Phase - Type - N - Y), consumed by routine_title.build_title_context. Manually advanced by Matthew — no auto/milestone-driven transitions. `current` is the active phase; flip it to advance and bump `current_started` to that date (this resets N per type). `current_started` = phase_started_date: N counts PERFORMED workouts of each type on/after it. `reset_epoch_date` = the experiment-reset anchor: Y counts PERFORMED workouts on/after it. Both are inclusive (>=). See ADR-067 (superseded by the 2026-06-16 work order).
